prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: 4SN-CUTLERYSET-13PC-44136 Product Type: KNIFE_BLOCK_SET Brand (from catalog): Universal Tool Existing Title: Beille Chef Stainless Steel Kitchen Cooking Black Handles Knife Block Set 13pc Description: If you've been meaning to upgrade your kitchen knife set or are looking to purchase your first full knife set with wood block, add the Beille 13pc Master Chef Stainless Steel Kitchen Cooking Baking Black Handles Full Tang Knife Set with Wood Block, Scissors and Chef Knife to your kitchen.

Never requiring sharpening (yes, never.), constructed from quality surgical high carbon stainless steel to ensure optimum sharpness for precise cutting, chopping and slicing, AND stylish black, ergonomic ABS plastic handles that provide comfort and confidence when handling, this knife set will easily meet all your food prep needs, whether you're making an easy summer salad, preparing salmon, mincing meat or chopping herbs for roasted potatoes. The knife set is dishwasher safe (although hand washing is recommended), and will tuck tidily away in the included wood block for easy storage on your kitchen counter, kitchen island or food prep area.

The most important component of this knife set is the essential chef knife--with micro-serrated edges that never require sharpening (notably, all knives in this knife set collection feature this), the chef knife is a must-have staple. Covering a ton of ground in your kitchen, this chef knife can prep, cut, chop and slice just about everything. A chef knife is designed to perform well at many differing kitchen food prep tasks, rather than excelling at one in particular, like a boning knife. It can be used for everything from mincing, slicing and chopping fruit and vegetables, to slicing meet or disjointing large cuts of poultry Search Terms: chef knives knife block sets blocks for kitchen set gift baking boning serrated steak gifts essentials gadgets decor Features: - QUALITY CONSTRUCTION: Never requiring sharpening, the Beille 13pc Stainless Steel Kitchen Full Tang Knife Set is constructed from quality surgical high carbon stainless steel that ensures optimum sharpness for precise cutting, chopping and slicing; this knife set features a comprehensive collection of knives that will quickly meet all your food prep needs and will last for years to come in your kitchen; strong, durable ABS plastic handles - ESSENTIAL CHEF KNIFE: This comprehensive knife set features an essential, must-have chef knife that will quickly become a staple in your kitchen on the food prep front; a chef knife is a multipurpose knife that is designed to handle everything from mincing, slicing, and chopping vegetables and fruit, to slicing meat or disjointing large cuts of poultry - EASY CLEANING AND STORAGE: Dishwasher safe but hand washing is recommended; rust and corrosion resistant, all the components of the knife set fit tidily into the wood bloc, for easy storage; this knife set will look stylish and modern on any kitchen counter, kitchen island or food prep station - 13PC VALUE KNIFE SET: Your set includes 1 chef knife, one carving knife, one boning knife, one paring knife, one utility knife, six table steak knives, black all-purpose kitchen scissors or shears and a wood block for knife storage on your kitchen counter - SPECIFICATIONS: Wood Block Dimensions: 4.5 inches deep x 3 inches wide x 8 inches tall; Weight: 15.7 ounces (oz); Scissors: 8 inches long; Materials: Stainless steel knives, wood storage block, ABS plastic handles; Color: Black/wood/stainless steel silver === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Universal Tool 13pc Black Stainless Steel Knife Block Set
